title: UFO files: US Department of War releases second batch of files sparking wild theories among online communities
description: The US Department of War released a second tranche of files relating to ‘alien and extraterrestrial life’ last week — and this batch has got the UFO community talking.

title: New UFO files reveal stunning evidence of mysterious silver spheres invading global airspace
